title: Kenya seeks public comment on draft VASP rules covering licensing and stablecoin backing

snippet: Stripe (@stripe): Introducing the Machine Payments Protocol, co-authored by Tempo and Stripe We’re launching the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP), an open standard, internet-native way for agents to pay. title: Ethereum Foundation Deploys 3,400 ETH into Morpho as Part of Treasury Strategy
message_html: Ethereum Foundation Deploys 3,400 ETH into Morpho as Part of Treasury Strategy ...
snippet: Ethereum Foundation (@ethereumfndn): 0/ The Ethereum Foundation continues to explore DeFi as part of its treasury strategy. In Oct 2025, EF deployed 2,400 ETH + ~$6M in stablecoins into @Morpho Vaults V1. Today: another 3,400 ETH into Morpho, where 1,000 ETH in Morpho Vaults V2. Why Morpho? 👇
